## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Siit to discuss ongoing marketing initiatives and progress.](https://fathom.video/share/StbSnbAYLhsyvmm4PeC-PxMBsg6zVznN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New blog design is live with improved categorization and search functionality](https://fathom.video/share/StbSnbAYLhsyvmm4PeC-PxMBsg6zVznN?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Tools page performing well with 434 unique pageviews in the past month](https://fathom.video/share/StbSnbAYLhsyvmm4PeC-PxMBsg6zVznN?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Siit ranking well in Google search results for key terms, indicating SEO progress](https://fathom.video/share/StbSnbAYLhsyvmm4PeC-PxMBsg6zVznN?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Plans to add FAQ sections to published articles and improve CTA placement on blog](https://fathom.video/share/StbSnbAYLhsyvmm4PeC-PxMBsg6zVznN?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Blog and Website Updates
